info.name: WeatherAPI.com
info.description:
WeatherAPI.com provides real-time, forecast, historical, marine, future, astronomy, air quality, pollen, sports, IP lookup, timezone, and geolocation data via a JSON/XML REST API. Trusted by 850,000+ developers worldwide. Average response time ~200ms.

## Authentication
All endpoints require an API key passed as the `key` query parameter.

## Base URL
`https://api.weatherapi.com/v1`

## Location Query (`q` parameter)
Accepts: city name, lat/lon decimal, US zip, UK postcode, Canada postal code, METAR code (`metar:EGLL`), IATA airport code (`iata:DXB`), IP lookup (`auto:ip`), IPv4/IPv6 address, or location ID (`id:2801268`).

## Plans
- **Free**: 100K calls/month, 3-day forecast, 1-day history
- **Starter**: $7/mo — 3M calls, 7-day forecast, 7-day history
- **Pro+**: $25/mo — 5M calls, 300-day future, 365-day history
- **Business**: $65/mo — 10M calls, evapotranspiration
- **Enterprise**: Custom — 15-min interval, pollen history, wind@100m, SLA

Contact Support:
 Name: WeatherAPI.com Support

query.description: (Required) Your WeatherAPI.com API key.
(Required) Location query. Accepts: city name, lat/lon, US zip, UK postcode, Canada postal code, METAR code (metar:EGLL), IATA (iata:DXB), auto:ip, IPv4/IPv6, or location ID (id:2801268).
Include Air Quality Index (AQI) data in response.
Include pollen data. Available on Pro+ and above.
Language code for condition text. E.g.: fr, de, es, zh, ar. See full list in docs.
Comma-separated list of fields to return in the current element, e.g. temp_c,wind_mph.

request.description: Returns up-to-date current weather for a given location. Data is refreshed every 10–15 minutes. Optionally includes air quality (AQI) and pollen data.

response.name: Current weather data

response.name: Historical weather data

request.description: Retrieve current weather for multiple locations in a single request. Pass `q=bulk` in the query string with a JSON body containing up to 50 locations. Each location counts as 1 call. Available on Pro+, Business, and Enterprise plans.
